name: Network Planner
description: A transit network-planning suite for Subway Builder. Module 1 - Catchment: accurate per-station walk circles, captured residents + jobs, network coverage %, journey-level conversion (drivers whose home AND work are both within reach), a ranked build-here frontier, per-route and per-station riders-vs-drivers, a station performance overlay, and a built-in no-key multi-provider satellite base layer (Esri / Google / OSM / MapTiler). More planning modules to come.
